title: bottlebottle Stainless Steel Water Bottle 700ml with Straw and Lid Sports Insulated Metal Drink Flask with Handle (Heartbeats)
features: A Straw and A Handle In 1 Lid: The leak-proof lid with straw and handle allows you drink conveniently and easily
Keep Drinks Cold and Hot: The double-wall vacuum insulated water bottle helps the liquids icy up to 24 hours or piping hot for up to 12 hours
Great Materials: Made of 18/8 food grade stainless steel, the BPA free water bottles provide you a safe and healthy drinking life without leaving the metal taste or rust
Hand Washing: The insulated water bottle is easy to clean. Hand washing is best. The bottle (not including the lid) is dishwasher safe, but this will shorten the life of the bottle
Easy to Carry: The 24 oz sports water bottle is perfect for outdoor activities, gym, work or home use. The durable and unique water bottles motivate you stay hydrated and stay strong
